events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Bolt head markings do not match submitted A325 grade",
    "No turn-of-nut match marks or DTI washer indications present",
    "Crew described joint as 'snug tight only' despite specification requiring pretensioned A325 bolts"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the connection as non-compliant",
    "Verify bolt grade and replace any incorrect bolts with proper A325 bolts",
    "Perform pretensioning using turn-of-nut method or DTI washers and apply required match marks",
    "Re-inspect after rework"
  ],
  "rationale": "The connection requires pretensioned A325 bolts per the splice detail. The observed bolts have incorrect head markings, no evidence of pretensioning (no match marks or DTI indications), and the crew's description confirms only snug-tight condition. This violates the specification and RCSC requirements for pretensioned joints.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts",
    "AISC 360-16 Section J3",
    "Project submittals and splice detail"
  ]
}
